title: CocoIndex daemon resilience
description: Two interacting bugs in mcp-coco-index daemon caused leaked-zombie processes and CPU-spinning log spam. Bug 1: start_daemon() in client.py:192-225 spawns blindly without checking for an existing alive daemon. Bug 2: daemon.py:436-444 error handler tries to send an error response over the same broken pipe that just failed, double-crashing on every client disconnect. Live evidence: 9-day-old leaked daemon (PID 98364), 564 BrokenPipeError lines across 23 MB daemon.log, 54-72% sustained CPU during multi-dispatch orchestrations. Plan: two surgical patches (idempotent start, pipe-safe error handler) plus 4 pytest cases plus operator recovery.
